description: Currently working as a Junior Software Engineer Trainee at zLink, Inc., where I'm learning new technologies like ASP.NET and gaining my first hands-on experience being part of a professional development team.

Worked as a freelance Video and Graphic Designer, creating visually engaging content for clients across various industries. Designed logos, social media posts, brochures, and promotional materials using Adobe Creative Cloud.
Completed a 6-month internship as a MERN Stack Developer, where I built and maintained full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js.
Worked as a freelance Video Editor, successfully delivering 30+ projects for clients across YouTube, Instagram, and other platforms. Created engaging and high-retention videos.
Completed a 1-month internship at Techoriz Digital Academy in 2023, where I was introduced to Full Stack PHP Development with a strong focus on the Laravel framework.
